MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS DAVID LAL, GOLDEN GATE POWER, LLC and GOLDEN GATE POWER COMPANY, INC'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is denied.
